title: DarkBlue (Alpha)
description: DarkBlue is a texture pack designed to be efficient and clean, removing visual distractions for PvP such as Vanilla or Mace.
body:
# Dark Blue

**DarkBlue** is a texture pack focused on efficiency and clarity, designed to remove visual distractions and enhance the PvP experience.

**Features**
Dark blue style
Reduced visual elements
Optimized for PvP

Works well with swords, UHC, Vanilla, and maces.

![Crystal of End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43fd4a302ef1df3fc637f837cd8c45eedf6da8a4.png)
